messages: Now let me check the existing e2e tests and fixtures to match the project's conventions:
The test file already exists and is well-structured. Let me check if there are any missing `required_dom` assertions and verify the package dependencies:

Now I have a complete picture. The test file exists and is well-structured but is missing `required_dom` assertions for `quick-view-view-full-details-link` (with `requires_non_empty_text`) and the text check for `quick-view-add-to-cart-btn`. Let me add these:
Now let me run the self-review gates to ensure compliance:
Let me verify these are false positives (comment mentions, not actual usage):
All self-review gates pass. Now let me commit the changes:
The commit was successful. Let me verify the final state of the spec file is correct:

The E2E test file is complete with all 6 required flows from the acceptance contract, proper `required_dom` assertions (including the newly added `quick-view-view-full-details-link` with non-empty text check and `quick-view-add-to-cart-btn` text verification), baseline noise patterns derived mechanically from `baseline.json`, and all self-review gates passing.
